task_goal: Move the file sunset.jpg from Alarms within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area to the Pictures within the same sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area in the Android filesystem.
task_goal_rewrite: The file sunset.jpg resides in the Pictures folder instead of the Alarms folder within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area of the Android filesystem.

checkpoints.description: The file sunset.jpg is present in the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace output showing sunset.jpg listed in the Pictures directory of the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage.

checkpoints.description: The file sunset.jpg is no longer present in the Alarms folder within the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace output showing the Alarms directory of the sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage does not contain sunset.jpg.

success_rule: Success is confirmed when both required checkpoints are satisfied: sunset.jpg is located in the target Pictures folder and has been removed from the original Alarms folder within the same sdk_gphone64_arm64 storage area.
